columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Synchronous | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: The study focuses on "de novo metastatic castration-sensitive prostate cancer," which is synonymous with synchronous metastases. However, the exact N (%) for each treatment arm is not explicitly stated. The study includes four arms: SOC (n=296), SOC plus radiotherapy (n=293), SOC plus abiraterone (n=292), and SOC plus radiotherapy plus abiraterone (n=291). All patients in these arms have synchronous metastases by definition of the inclusion criteria. The exact N (%) for each treatment arm is not explicitly stated but can be derived from the arm sizes.
columns.column_name_raw: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Synchronous | Treatment

columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Synchronous | Control
columns.extraction_plan: The study focuses on "de novo metastatic castration-sensitive prostate cancer," which is synonymous with synchronous metastases. However, the exact N (%) for each control arm is not explicitly stated. The study includes two control arms: SOC (n=296) and SOC plus radiotherapy (n=293). All patients in these arms have synchronous metastases by definition of the inclusion criteria. The exact N (%) for each control arm is not explicitly stated but can be derived from the arm sizes.
columns.column_name_raw: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Synchronous | Control

columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Metachronous | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: The study specifically includes patients with de novo (synchronous) metastatic prostate cancer. Therefore, patients with metachronous metastases are excluded.

columns.column_name: Mode of metastases - N (%) | Metachronous | Control
columns.extraction_plan: The study specifically includes patients with de novo (synchronous) metastatic prostate cancer. Therefore, patients with metachronous metastases are excluded.
